creator: milios@ccsys.com
text:
Created attachment 214037
svn diff from /usr/ports/www/youtube_dl

rockin my house off the foundation presently. i've downloaded all of one video

i use 11.3-RELEASE-p8/amd64

did not portlint or poudriere or anything like that, just tweaked PORTVERSION and did:

make -DBATCH deinstall makesum clean package install

to promptly commence liquefaction of spiral ganglions with opus stereo audio and incineration of retinae with vp9 4K video from a webm container complements of the port's namesake
